title: Fix registration failure and post-registration navigation

requirements.text: Fix the registration flow in RegistrationScreen.tsx so that calling createUser on the backend succeeds without errors. Add proper error handling that surfaces a readable error message to the user if registration fails, and ensure the component correctly awaits the mutation result before attempting navigation.

quotes: Registration failed on registration screen while not opening the next screen.

acceptanceCriteria: Submitting a valid display name and username on the registration screen calls createUser on the backend without throwing an unhandled error.
If createUser returns an error variant or throws, a readable error message is displayed inline on the registration form.
If createUser succeeds, the app immediately navigates to the chat list screen without delay.
The registration button is disabled while the mutation is in-flight to prevent double submission.
No console errors related to undefined actor, missing principal, or unhandled promise rejection appear during registration.

requirements.text: Fix the post-registration navigation in App.tsx so that after a successful createUser call, the app transitions from the registration screen to the chat list screen immediately. Ensure the currentUser / profile state is updated before the navigation check runs, so the app does not loop back to registration or get stuck on a loading screen.

quotes: Registration failed on registration screen while not opening the next screen.

acceptanceCriteria: After successful registration, the app displays the chat list screen without requiring a manual page refresh.
The app does not re-render back to the registration screen after a successful createUser call.
The app does not show an indefinite loading spinner after registration completes.
The user's newly created profile is available in app state immediately after navigation to the chat list screen.

requirements.text: Audit and fix the backend createUser function in backend/main.mo to ensure it correctly handles duplicate username and principal checks, returns a clear error variant when registration fails, and persists the new user record reliably so subsequent getMyProfile calls return the newly created profile.

quotes: Registration failed on registration screen while not opening the next screen.

acceptanceCriteria: createUser returns an #ok variant with the new user profile when registration succeeds.
createUser returns an #err variant with a descriptive message when the username is already taken.
createUser returns an #err variant when the caller's principal is already registered.
A call to getMyProfile immediately after a successful createUser returns the newly created profile.
No trap or unhandled error occurs in the actor during a normal registration call.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Keep all Motoko logic in backend/main.mo as a single actor.
nonGoals: Changing the registration form fields or visual design.
Modifying any other screen besides RegistrationScreen.tsx and the navigation logic in App.tsx.
